description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script installing tox with pip. Define three jobs in the default test stage: a job named test:36 using the python:3.6 image, setting the TOX_ENV variable to py36 and executing tox -e $TOX_ENV; a job named test:manifest also using python:3.6, setting TOX_ENV to manifest and running tox -e $TOX_ENV; and a job named test:pep8 using python:3.6, setting TOX_ENV to pep8 and running tox -e $TOX_ENV. Each job is configured with when: always so they run on every pipeline. No caches, artifacts, or special triggers are defined.
